title: Help to create new client workflow - Glasgow/Scotland/UK

posts.author: stephlindsay82 (Stephanie Lindsay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We are using multiple boards to track marketing campaigns for a client including data like media type booked, cost of advertisement and invoice date.

The client is billed for multiple campaigns each week, therefore we need to create a master view of all items, across multiple boards to filter up to a weekly board view. For example Ad X Costs £200 on Board 1 and Ad Y costs £300 on Board 2. The master board should show a total spend of £500 for that period.

I am unsure if this needs an integration, but we would ideally like someone to help us set this up soon.

Thanks,
Steph

Business Type: Marketing Agency
Location: UK
Timeline: ASAP

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @stephlindsay82 - and welcome to the community! You have certainly come to the right place as there are numerous fantastic monday.com resources here to assist.

We have developed many master board solutions in the past. Basically, what we can do is reverse the usual approach. In summary, the Master board will feed the child boards. We can then roll all the Master board details up into Overview boards which summarize the data any way you want to visualize it (+ dashboards, etc).

It’s best for us to connect for a complementary 1hr session to discuss this in a little more detail to ensure we fully understand your needs and can tailor the perfect solution.

Feel free to send me a message at info@greenllamas.com and check us out online to see what we do!

Thank you and looking forward to speaking with you more.
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: stephlindsay82 (Stephanie Lindsay)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @mark.anley thank you, I’ll email you now! Cheers!
